framing: Investable units are patent-defined technology packages. Many are university or hospital assignees with OTL/BRF licensing paths, not standalone incorporated startups.
scoring_note: Promise tier (A/B/C) combines patent cluster depth, active federal funding, clinical/regulatory signal, and clarity of license vehicle. Not investment advice.

opportunities.title: Wireless neurograins & distributed cortical implants
opportunities.thesis: DARPA-scale wireless microscale sensor network replaces tethered Utah arrays; dense Brown continuation family through 2020s applications.

opportunities.title: Speech decoding & multi-device tablet iBCI
opportunities.thesis: Recent grants + recruiting speech/tablet trials de-risk decoding IP separate from hardware vendors (Blackrock, Synchron).

opportunities.title: Nanopieces non-viral RNA / nanocarrier delivery
opportunities.thesis: Hospital assignee with STTR-funded startup; IP package licensable for ortho/CNS indications beyond current NanoDe scope.

opportunities.title: Chitinase-1 inhibition for pulmonary fibrosis (OCF-203 family)
opportunities.thesis: Single high-value composition-of-matter style filing with decades of NHLBI P01 support; corporate license status requires 2025 OCF-203 diligence.

opportunities.title: IAIP biologics & rapid LFIA for sepsis/NEC/HIE
opportunities.thesis: Four-filing estate plus ~$3M+ active SBIR track; plasma-derived and diagnostic claims support dual product paths.

opportunities.title: Intelligent spinal interface & closed-loop DBS facilitation
opportunities.thesis: Distinct from cortical BCI; DARPA-funded SCI rehab with IDE trial at RIH—suitable for medtech strategic or SPV.

opportunities.title: Tregitope regulatory T-cell epitope therapeutics
opportunities.thesis: Deepest RI patent cluster outside neurotech; platform ARR plus spinout therapeutics—less seed, more strategic/platform capital.

opportunities.title: Biglycan musculoskeletal & neuromuscular regeneration
opportunities.thesis: BRF-held rare-disease/muscle regeneration package with no RI startup in map—classic OTL out-license opportunity.

opportunities.title: Core neural signal decoding & cortical interface (Donoghue era)
opportunities.thesis: Foundational BMI patents may underpin FTO for new entrants; diligence on encumbrances vs wireless/speech sub-families essential.

opportunities.title: AI-guided atrial fibrillation ablation mapping (VX1)
opportunities.thesis: Patent-protected SaMD with regulatory clearance; growth-stage, not classic university spinout.

opportunities.title: Hybridization-assisted nanopore / electronic genome mapping
opportunities.thesis: Brown-origin genomics IP now commercial; patent package relevant for structural-variant tools M&A, not seed.

opportunities.title: Encapsulated cell therapy for retinal degeneration (CNTF)
opportunities.thesis: Large ECT patent runway in Cumberland RI; secondary liquidity / royalty plays rather than formation capital.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: SMURF2–HIF1α oncology
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: 0 patents in curated set; El-Deiry portfolio ~19 per CV—harvest IN/El-Deiry and SMURF-Therapeutics assignee

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: SOMA interoception / pain digital therapeutic
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: Grant-supported (COBRE); expect software/trade secret—USPTO assignee search Petzschner/Gunsilius

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: HiTIMED / immune epigenetic deconvolution
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: 0 in curated set; Brown OTL software/method disclosures
